articles.title: Physicists witness pinpricks of darkness moving faster than the speed of light — without breaking the laws of relativity - Live Science
articles.description: For the first time, researchers measured singularities in combined light and sound waves moving faster than the speed of light. The findings have implications in fluid dynamics, optics and many other fields.
